core.title: Federation Architecture
core.description: The schema, JSON-LD, and entity relationship system that connects 80+ properties into a federated authority network. AI-to-AI communication architecture.

content.about: Federation is the infrastructure layer that connects the portfolio into something larger than individual sites. This channel documents the schema design, entity relationships, and sameAs/isPartOf structures that make the network visible to AI systems.
content.what_to_expect: JSON-LD design sessions, entity mapping, cross-domain schema relationships, and the thinking behind building an AI-readable authority network.

seo.meta_description: Schema, JSON-LD, and entity relationship systems connecting 80+ digital properties into a federated AI-readable authority network.
